# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface AppConfig {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewUI: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures: boolean;
    maintenanceMode: boolean;
    enableAnalytics: boolean;
  };
  rateLimiting: {
    maxRequestsPerMinute: number;
    enabled: boolean;
  };
  cache: {
    ttlSeconds: number;
    enabled: boolean;
  };
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
  },
  rateLimiting: {
    maxRequestsPerMinute: 100,
    enabled: true,
  },
  cache: {
    ttlSeconds: 300,
    enabled: true,
  },
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const connectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!connectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  const edgeConfigClient = createClient(connectionString);

  try {
    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimiting, cache] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('API_KEY').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('DB_URL').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<AppConfig['featureFlags']>('featureFlags').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<AppConfig['rateLimiting']>('rateLimiting').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<AppConfig['cache']>('cache').catch(() => null),
    ]);

    const config: AppConfig = {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      featureFlags: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureFlags, ...featureFlags }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureFlags,
      rateLimiting: rateLimiting
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.rateLimiting, ...rateLimiting }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.rateLimiting,
      cache: cache
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.cache, ...cache }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.cache,
    };

    return config;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config, falling back to defaults:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function maskSensitiveValue(value: string): string {
  if (value.length <= 8) {
    return '****';
  }
  return value.substring(0, 4) + '****' + value.substring(value.length - 4);
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  const appConfig = await getEdgeConfig();

  if (pathname === '/api/config/health') {
    const edgeConfigAvailable = !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        edgeConfigAvailable,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        region: process.env.VERCEL_REGION || 'unknown',
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/features') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        featureFlags: appConfig.featureFlags,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': appConfig.cache.enabled
            ? `s-maxage=${appConfig.cache.ttlSeconds}, stale-while-revalidate`
            : 'no-cache',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/check-feature') {
    const featureName = url.searchParams.get('name');

    if (!featureName) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing "name" query parameter' }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    const featureValue =
      appConfig.featureFlags[featureName as keyof AppConfig['featureFlags']];

    if (featureValue === undefined) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: `Feature flag "${featureName}" not found`,
          availableFlags: Object.keys(appConfig.featureFlags),
        }),
        {
          status: 404,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        feature: featureName,
        enabled: featureValue,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === '/api/config/rate-limit') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        rateLimiting: appConfig.rateLimiting,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (appConfig.featureFlags.maintenanceMode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
        maintenanceMode: true,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '60',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  const safeConfig = {
    API_KEY: maskSensitiveValue(appConfig.API_KEY),
    DB_URL: maskSensitiveValue(appConfig.DB_URL),
    featureFlags: appConfig.featureFlags,
    rateLimiting: appConfig.rateLimiting,
    cache: appConfig.cache,
  };

  const responsePayload = {
    message: 'Edge Config Function is running',
    config: safeConfig,
    edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
    region: process.env.VERCEL_REGION || 'unknown',
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    endpoints: {
      health: '/api/config/health',
      features: '/api/config/features',
      checkFeature: '/api/config/check-feature?name=enableNewUI',
      rateLimit: '/api/config/rate-limit',
    },
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(responsePayload, null, 2), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Cache-Control': appConfig.cache.enabled
        ? `s-maxage=${appConfig.cache.ttlSeconds}, stale-while-revalidate`
        : 'no-cache',
      'X-Edge-Config-Connected': String(!!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG),
      'X-Maintenance-Mode': String(appConfig.featureFlags.maintenanceMode),
    },
  });
}
